name: design-system@your-org
description: World-class design-system governance for Claude Code — bundles skills + hooks + commands + rules + CLAUDE.md as a single installable plugin. Consumers enable once and inherit all DS canonical (M-rules, audit dims, codex collab discipline, knowledge-prune cadence).

pathScopedRules.rationale: 31 active M-rules — fundamental governance,every session needs
